findings.title: Pipeline Consolidation Summary
findings.description: Consolidated 37 findings from 7 agents into 27 unique findings. Removed 10 duplicates. Identified 5 cross-agent conflicts.

findings.title: Top Priority Findings
findings.description: Highest priority items based on weighted scoring (user_impact×0.35 + business_value×0.30) / (effort×0.20 + risk×0.15): Build Customer-Facing Status Page (score=2.81); User Feedback Collection Mechanism (score=2.786); Performance Benchmarking Documentation (score=2.786); API Latency Degradation (score=2.742); Primary KPI: API p95 Latency (score=2.742)

findings.title: Cross-Agent Conflict Resolution Report
findings.description: Resolved 5 conflicts between agent findings. competitive-001 vs feasibility-001: Critical regression in core metrics conflicts with the critical risk posed by performance regressions in dashboard load times and API response times.; competitive-002 vs metrics-005: The lack of automated performance benchmarking tools conflicts with the recommendation to implement performance regression detection.; customer-001 vs metrics-001: The critical dashboard load time regression conflicts with the North Star metric emphasizing the importance of dashboard load time.

evidence.excerpt: Critical regression in core metrics conflicts with the critical risk posed by performance regressions in dashboard load times and API response times.
The lack of automated performance benchmarking tools conflicts with the recommendation to implement performance regression detection.
The critical dashboard load time regression conflicts with the North Star metric emphasizing the importance of dashboard load time.
API latency degradation conflicts with the dependency on optimizing database queries to restore API performance.
The WebSocket memory leak issue conflicts with the requirement to resolve the memory leak to prevent server crashes.

conflicts.description: Critical regression in core metrics conflicts with the critical risk posed by performance regressions in dashboard load times and API response times.
conflicts.resolution: Prioritize immediate performance optimization efforts to address both dashboard load time and API response time regressions.
conflicts.reasoning: Both findings highlight critical risks to user experience; addressing them concurrently will mitigate churn and improve satisfaction.

conflicts.description: The lack of automated performance benchmarking tools conflicts with the recommendation to implement performance regression detection.
conflicts.resolution: Develop and integrate automated performance benchmarking tools into the CI pipeline to facilitate ongoing performance monitoring.
conflicts.reasoning: Implementing benchmarking tools will not only address the gap but also support the recommendation for regression detection.

conflicts.description: The critical dashboard load time regression conflicts with the North Star metric emphasizing the importance of dashboard load time.
conflicts.resolution: Focus on resolving the dashboard load time regression as a priority to align with the North Star metric and improve user experience.
conflicts.reasoning: Addressing the regression directly supports the goal of maintaining optimal load times as defined by the North Star metric.

conflicts.description: API latency degradation conflicts with the dependency on optimizing database queries to restore API performance.
conflicts.resolution: Implement immediate database query optimizations while concurrently addressing API latency issues to restore performance.
conflicts.reasoning: Both findings indicate critical performance issues; simultaneous action will ensure a comprehensive approach to restoring API performance.

conflicts.description: The WebSocket memory leak issue conflicts with the requirement to resolve the memory leak to prevent server crashes.
conflicts.resolution: Prioritize the resolution of the WebSocket memory leak issue to ensure stability and prevent further server crashes.
conflicts.reasoning: Addressing the memory leak is essential for maintaining real-time monitoring capabilities and overall platform stability.

summary: Consolidated 37 findings into 27 unique items. Removed 10 duplicates, resolved 5 conflicts. Top priority: Build Customer-Facing Status Page.
